programme.title: Out of the Ashes
programme.desc: On the brink of closure, captains must join forces to save the fishery.

programme.title: MeatEater - Steve Makes the Team: Kentucky Small Game
programme.desc: Kevin Murphy and his band of Kentucky small game hunters introduce Steve to the finest Kentucky has to offer. Gray squirrels with tree hounds and cottontails with beagles, in Kentucky, it's the dogs that do the hunting. Cathead biscuits, sawmill gravy, and fried small game round out the Kentucky adventure.

programme.title: MeatEater - A Trip of Firsts: Mexico Coues Deer
programme.desc: Steve and Janis head into the remote mountains of Sonora, Mexico, to pursue the elusive Coues deer.

programme.title: MeatEater - Trapped in History: Wyoming Beaver
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads to the historic beaver trapping grounds of Wyoming to explore the legacy of the mountain man era. As he sets traps along the Green River, Steve immerses himself in the methods and stories of early American trappers. Alongside his quest to catch beavers, he delves into the fascinating history of how beavers shaped the fur trade and American frontier life. It's a journey through both the rugged landscapes and the rich heritage of the American West.

programme.title: MeatEater - Conservation History, New Mexico Turkey
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and ecologist Karl Malcolm head to the Cibola National Forest, guided by a century-old tip from conservationist Aldo Leopold, to hunt Merriam's wild turkeys. Their adventure showcases the forest's rich history and the legacy of Leopold's conservation efforts while they track these elusive birds through challenging terrain.

programme.title: MeatEater - Cooking Special: Smoked Meats With Eduardo Garcia
programme.desc: Steven Rinella learns new culinary tricks from Chef Eduardo Garcia, a wild game enthusiast from Charged Film & Montana Mex. As Eduardo shares his expertise in smoking meats and preparing wild game dishes, Steve takes notes, eager to expand his culinary repertoire and bring fresh flavors to his own wild game cooking adventures.

programme.title: MeatEater - Lone Star Pork: Texas Hog
programme.desc: Steven Rinella joins ranch manager and wildlife biologist Ben Binnion in Texas to explore the often-overlooked aspects of hog management. During the annual pig roundup, Steve learns about the ecological impact and challenges of controlling the hog population, providing a deeper understanding of the complexities of hunting and wildlife management in the Lone Star State.

programme.title: MeatEater - Mountain Memories: Montana Black Bear
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads deep into Montana's rugged mountains to hunt black bears, reflecting on two decades of memories in this harsh yet captivating landscape. Joined by memories of his brother and their youthful adventures, Steve navigates grizzly country, contemplates the passage of time, and explores the evolving nature of hunting. Through encounters with both bears and the terrain, Steve seeks not just game but a connection to the past and the lessons it holds.

programme.title: MeatEater - Nevada Mule Deer with Joe Rogan
programme.desc: Steven Rinella teams up with Joe Rogan in Nevada's high desert to bowhunt for elusive mule deer bucks. Surrounded by vast public lands and rugged terrain, they navigate the challenges of close-range stalking with their bows. With Joe's enthusiasm for archery and Steve's experience, the duo pushes their limits in pursuit of these wary deer, embracing the highs and lows of hunting in one of America's most unforgiving landscapes.

programme.title: MeatEater - Alaska Moose Part 1
programme.desc: Steve and Janis are deep in the wilderness of eastern Alaska on a challenging moose and caribou hunt. Joined by Janis' father, Papa Jani, who wants one last adventure before age catches up, they endure the highs and lows of remote hunting. With patience wearing thin and the weather turning, the group pushes through thick willows and foggy mornings, hoping for a bit of luck and a successful hunt before their journey's end.

programme.title: MeatEater - Alaska Moose Part 2
programme.desc: Steve and Janis are deep in the wilderness of eastern Alaska on a challenging moose and caribou hunt. Joined by Janis' father, Papa Jani, who wants one last adventure before age catches up, they endure the highs and lows of remote hunting. With patience wearing thin and the weather turning, the group pushes through thick willows and foggy mornings, hoping for a bit of luck and a successful hunt before their journey's end.

programme.title: MeatEater - Prince Of Wales: Fishing and Deer
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads back to his fish shack on Prince of Wales Island in Southeast Alaska, this time with friend and colleague Morgan Fallon. Known for his cinematography, Mo now wants to switch roles from behind the camera to filling his freezer. Together, they embark on a classic Alaskan adventure: fishing for rockfish, setting shrimp pots, and hunting Sitka blacktail deer, all while reminiscing about past trips and discovering new ways the wilderness shapes them.

programme.title: MeatEater - Wyoming Sage Grouse
programme.desc: Steve and his friend Ronny Boehme head to the vast sagebrush seas of Southeast Wyoming to hunt.

programme.title: MeatEater - Prince of Wales: Sitka Blacktail Deer Part 1
programme.desc: Late October in Southeast Alaska finds Steve, Ryan Callahan, and Mark Borman chasing Sitka blacktail deer. As the bucks begin their descent from the alpine into dense timber, the trio faces the challenge of hunting in the thick, damp rainforest. While navigating through muskeg patches and testing their luck with calling techniques, they must contend with unpredictable weather and tough terrain. When deer prove elusive, they turn to fishing and foraging.

programme.title: MeatEater - Prince of Wales: Sitka Blacktail Deer Part 2
programme.desc: Midway through a challenging hunt on Prince of Wales Island, Steve, Ryan Callahan, and Mark Borman are searching for Sitka blacktail deer. The rut hasn't kicked in as expected, leaving the hunters frustrated and the deer elusive. Adapting their strategies, they decide to split up and quietly stalk through dense woods and muskeg. After days of patience and perseverance, a mix of skill, luck, and determination finally leads them closer to success.

programme.title: MeatEater - Remi And Steve, Elk Hunting Again
programme.desc: In the bitter cold of Montana's Bitterroot Mountains, Steve teams up with Remi Warren.

programme.title: MeatEater - Guyana Part 1
programme.desc: Deep in the heart of Guyana's jungle, Steve teams up with Macushi guides Roven and Dennis to explore.

programme.title: MeatEater - Guyana Part 2
programme.desc: Deep in the heart of Guyana's jungle, Steve teams up with Macushi guides Roven and Dennis to explore.

programme.title: MeatEater - Guyana Part 3
programme.desc: Deep in the heart of Guyana's jungle, Steve teams up with Macushi guides Roven and Dennis to explore.

programme.title: MeatEater - Colorado Mule Deer with Brody Henderson
programme.desc: In the rugged terrain of central Colorado, Steven Rinella and his friend Brody Henderson set out to hunt mule deer amidst aspen groves and sagebrush. Navigating unseasonably warm November weather, they face challenges in tracking down the elusive deer as the heat pushes the animals into cooler, shaded areas. After several attempts, including a close encounter thwarted by coyotes, the duo finally spots a promising buck.

programme.title: Rincón brujo
programme.desc: During the Revolution, between the states of Oaxaca and Chiapas, arms smugglers are persecuted by federal troops but manage to reach a town called Rincon Brujo.

programme.title: Ave sin nido
programme.desc: In this dramatic morality tale from Director Chano Urueto, a pretty young girl is torn between her religious faith and true love. She ultimately leaves the Convent and the nuns who cared for her, in order to marry a handsome and successful engineer. The couple's marital bliss is cut short when they find they cannot conceive children. After having an extramarital affair, the husband fathers a girl with the other woman. While hurt by his infidelity at first, this wife recovers and both soon realize that they could raise this baby as their own daughter, while allowing the biological mother to avoid the shame and stigma of having a child out of wedlock. This convenient solution seems as if it was tailor-made and heaven-sent. This mutually advantageous and seemingly harmless lie works out well through the years, as their daughter grows into a beautiful young woman in her own right. Just as she is about to marry her own true love, the poor girl finally discovers the awful truth. Consequently, she feels that she must now go live with her birth mother, especially after being lied to for so long by those who raised her. Worst of all, she is suddenly forced to come to grips with the fact that she is really an illegitimate child, born out of wedlock, as the result of an adulterous affair. As such, she now considers herself to be tainted and utterly unworthy to marry her intended, or anyone else, for that matter. The all-star cast includes Rene Cardona, David Silva and Jose Pulido.

programme.title: El niño y la niebla
programme.desc: Marta (Dolores del Río) es una mujer que vive obsesionada, ya que su madre y su hermano murieron de esquizofrenia. Temerosa de que la enfermedad sea congénita, sobreprotege hasta el extremo a su único hijo (Alejandro Ciangherotti Jr.). Debido a su obsesión, Marta no se da cuenta que la única afectada psicológicamente en su familia es ella.

programme.title: Escuela de valientes
programme.desc: An early 1960s Mexican western in the vaquero style. Recently widowed ranch owner Gabriela Bermúdez is facing trouble from neighboring haciendado Don Atenor. Her aunt, Tia Lola, tells her this is why she should remarry and Gabriela reluctantly accepts the notion. She decides he should be ranch savvy and strong and goes to the town fair to peruse the bravado and deeds of the macho men hanging out. Agustin and his buddy El Tigre provide comic relief, as Tigre falls in love with Gabriela, though he is not really her type. Madly in love he tries to impress her in increasingly comic situations, eventually taking on the guise of a gun runner to seem more worldly and able to handle situations. Director Julian Soler does a good job of balancing the light and serious sides of the movie making the production an enjoyable example of early 1960s Mexican vaquero movies. The tradition of the American cowboy, is the subject matter of countless Hollywood movies. But those movies have never dealt with the true origins with the Mexican "vaquero" whose traditions were adapted to create the iconic American "Cowboy", originally a truly Mexican tradition.

programme.title: El que tenga un amor

programme.title: Rincón brujo
programme.desc: During the Revolution, between the states of Oaxaca and Chiapas, arms smugglers are persecuted by federal troops but manage to reach a town called Rincon Brujo.

programme.title: Ave sin nido
programme.desc: In this dramatic morality tale from Director Chano Urueto, a pretty young girl is torn between her religious faith and true love. She ultimately leaves the Convent and the nuns who cared for her, in order to marry a handsome and successful engineer. The couple's marital bliss is cut short when they find they cannot conceive children. After having an extramarital affair, the husband fathers a girl with the other woman. While hurt by his infidelity at first, this wife recovers and both soon realize that they could raise this baby as their own daughter, while allowing the biological mother to avoid the shame and stigma of having a child out of wedlock. This convenient solution seems as if it was tailor-made and heaven-sent. This mutually advantageous and seemingly harmless lie works out well through the years, as their daughter grows into a beautiful young woman in her own right. Just as she is about to marry her own true love, the poor girl finally discovers the awful truth. Consequently, she feels that she must now go live with her birth mother, especially after being lied to for so long by those who raised her. Worst of all, she is suddenly forced to come to grips with the fact that she is really an illegitimate child, born out of wedlock, as the result of an adulterous affair. As such, she now considers herself to be tainted and utterly unworthy to marry her intended, or anyone else, for that matter. The all-star cast includes Rene Cardona, David Silva and Jose Pulido.

programme.title: El niño y la niebla
programme.desc: Marta (Dolores del Río) es una mujer que vive obsesionada, ya que su madre y su hermano murieron de esquizofrenia. Temerosa de que la enfermedad sea congénita, sobreprotege hasta el extremo a su único hijo (Alejandro Ciangherotti Jr.). Debido a su obsesión, Marta no se da cuenta que la única afectada psicológicamente en su familia es ella.

programme.title: Escuela de valientes
programme.desc: An early 1960s Mexican western in the vaquero style. Recently widowed ranch owner Gabriela Bermúdez is facing trouble from neighboring haciendado Don Atenor. Her aunt, Tia Lola, tells her this is why she should remarry and Gabriela reluctantly accepts the notion. She decides he should be ranch savvy and strong and goes to the town fair to peruse the bravado and deeds of the macho men hanging out. Agustin and his buddy El Tigre provide comic relief, as Tigre falls in love with Gabriela, though he is not really her type. Madly in love he tries to impress her in increasingly comic situations, eventually taking on the guise of a gun runner to seem more worldly and able to handle situations. Director Julian Soler does a good job of balancing the light and serious sides of the movie making the production an enjoyable example of early 1960s Mexican vaquero movies. The tradition of the American cowboy, is the subject matter of countless Hollywood movies. But those movies have never dealt with the true origins with the Mexican "vaquero" whose traditions were adapted to create the iconic American "Cowboy", originally a truly Mexican tradition.

programme.title: El que tenga un amor
programme.desc: Al terminar sus estudios, los padres de Víctor lo obligan a dejar a su novia Lucero para casarse con una mujer que ellos han elegido para él. Víctor le pide a sus amigos Simón y Julio que le ayuden a desaparecer, pero Lucero no se dará por vencida.

programme.title: Mi vieja
programme.desc: Luis le pide a Pedro que lo releve con un asunto. Pedro se confunde y actúa de manera exagerada. Germán evitará que dejen basura afuera del edificio.

programme.title: Nuevo inquilino
programme.desc: Un nuevo vecino llega al edificio para rentar uno de los departamentos y Silvia se enamora de él. Germán quiere tatuarse y pide recomendaciones.

programme.title: La venganza de la maestra
programme.desc: Alejandra descubre que la maestra de Morris es Belén, la misma maestra que ella molestaba. Chelo, la empleada doméstica de Silvia, tiene más suerte en el amor que ella.

programme.title: Arturo amuleto
programme.desc: Jorjáis cree que Arturo le trae buena suerte a su equipo de fútbol cuando va a los partidos, por lo que buscará la manera para que él esté presente en la final del torneo y así poder ganar.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: In a neighborhood in Mexico City, the neighbors have problems and silly misadventures with one another.

programme.title: Echando cohetes
programme.desc: Los vecinos se molestan por el ruido que provocan los cohetes de una fiesta. Rocko se queja de que Alejandra no es cariñosa con él.

programme.title: Vecinos
programme.desc: In a neighborhood in Mexico City, the neighbors have problems and silly misadventures with one another.

programme.title: El regreso de Luis
programme.desc: Luis le pide a Silvia que sea su novia, Pedro lo convence de ser mejor persona y así conseguir su amor. Los López Pérez regresan a vivir al edificio y Germán les tiene a todos una sorpresa.

programme.title: Primera cita
programme.desc: Magdalena es la nueva jefa de seguridad y, debido a los robos en el edificio, instala cámaras con la ayuda de Germán. Silvita y Luisito tienen su primera cita.

programme.title: El cumple de Silvia
programme.desc: Silvia cumple años y aconsejan a Luis que no la felicite para llamar su atención. Los López Pérez no encuentran a Morris por ningún lado y sospechan que se ha ido de la casa.

programme.title: Luis pobretón
programme.desc: Luis se ha quedado sin trabajo, por lo que buscará una nueva actividad para invitar a Silvia a salir. Por otro lado, Luismi ha llegado solo al edificio.

programme.title: La novia de Pedro
programme.desc: Pedro invita a salir a Cris, la mejor amiga de Silvia, y organiza una cita doble con Luis y Silvita. La alcaldía instala una cámara de fotomultas y los flashazos apuntan directo al edificio.

programme.title: En una relación
programme.desc: Después de un tiempo de salir juntos, Luis le pregunta a Silvia qué son y quiere que se decida de una vez. La alcaldía instala lámparas de led en el alumbrado público y la no deja dormir a los vecinos.

programme.title: Beso fallido
programme.desc: Luis invita a Silvia a ver una película a su casa, pero Pedro interrumpirá su romántico momento, pues quiere recuperar su tele. Por otra parte, Arturo jugará póker con Germán, Jorjais y Benito.

programme.title: Las pantuflas de Luis
programme.desc: Luis y Pedro hacen una apuesta para saber si se dice pantuflas o pantunflas y le preguntarán a todos los vecinos. Lorena sospecha que Benito está molesto por su nuevo galán.

programme.title: Segundo aire
programme.desc: Germán descubre que en el edificio hay una plaga de cucarachas, por lo que Magdalena le ordena que haga una inspección en su departamento.

programme.title: Número equivocado
programme.desc: Alguien grafiteó la fachada del edificio. Para retirarlo, Germán cambia el número de la entrada. ¿Recibirá Luis el paquete que espera? ¿Acudirán a pintar el departamento de Lorena?

programme.title: Magdalena y la tercera edad
programme.desc: Magdalena descubre que las personas de tercera edad recibirán tarjetas de ayuda. La familia López Pérez intenta obtener el beneficio. A Luis le molesta que Benito tenga un auto nuevo.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.title: Frida
programme.desc: The most prominent female painter of Latin America, Frida Kahlo, is agonizing in her Coyoacán home. She evokes memories of her childhood, of the streetcar accident that caused her terrible pain and affliction, her friendship with Trotsky and painter Alfaro Siqueiros, her marriage to Diego Rivera, her miscarriage, her political commitment, her love affairs and the anticipated exhibition of her works.

programme.title: Movie The Perfect Mate
programme.desc: Hope (Brittany Lucio) is a control freak and a perfectionist and nothing would please her more than bringing the perfect Christian future husband home for the weekend to meet her father Reverend Adams (Lawrence Hilton-Jacobs), her mother Mrs. Adams (Jackee Harry), and sister Cherish (KD Aubert). On the day they're scheduled to leave she's dumped by her fiancé. That's when she enlists the help of her platonic male friend, Jesse (Chico Benymon), who is the epitome of everything ungodly, to impersonate her ex, the upcoming pastor. While there, he learns to appreciate family and faith in this hilarious Christian Romance Comedy.

programme.title: Not As Long As My Song!
programme.desc: Hitting your limit isn't a sign of weakness; it's an invitation to shift your perspective. When the enemy brings the battle to your mind, remember that he only attacks what's valuable. And God's goodness is your secret weapon to win the fight.

programme.title: Hand Him The Plan
programme.desc: Sometimes the battle in your mind is proof that God's trying to do something great in your heart. What you see isn't the full picture of what God has for you. When you hand God your plans, you make room for His purpose.

programme.title: Sinking In The Storm
programme.desc: When you feel like you're starting to sink in the storm, call on the name of Jesus. He's near, and He won't let you go down. Don't panic and obsess over the problem, because when you sync up with Jesus, things can change just that quick.

programme.title: The Prayer That Repairs
programme.desc: Don't be so confused about the noise around you that you can't hear the God who made you. When you're faced with a struggle you didn't see coming, remember that Jesus is already praying for you, and His prayer is stronger than any attack.

programme.title: Move It To The Middle
programme.desc: Stressed, insecure, and stuck - that's how Moses felt, too. But that wasn't the end of his story, and it's not yours, either. It's just the middle. There's hope past this chapter, and it's found by shifting your focus back to God.

programme.title: A Recipe For Resentment
programme.desc: If you've been feeling pulled in every direction, it might be time to pivot. God isn't asking you to do everything - He's asking you to stay close to Him.

programme.title: The Lord Will Lighten Your Load
programme.desc: When you've been hurt, it can be hard to keep hoping. But God wants to lift the weight you've been carrying today. Learn from the life of Israel (Jacob, Jacob), how God will give you a strategy to unburden your heart and move forward.

programme.title: When God Gets Ready
programme.desc: People label, but God names; you don't have to chase identity or earn worth.
